samples.xml_description:
<module id="traffic_light">
    <description>A traffic light system with red, yellow, and green LEDs, and a pedestrian button.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="pass_request">Pedestrian button request signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Asynchronous reset signal.</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <output id="red">Red LED output.</output>
        <output id="yellow">Yellow LED output.</output>
        <output id="green">Green LED output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state_name>idle</state_name>
        <state_name>s1_red</state_name>
        <state_name>s2_yellow</state_name>
        <state_name>s3_green</state_name>
    </parameter_description>
    
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <signal_list>
            <signal id="cnt" type="reg" width_description="[7:0]" init_value="8'd10"/>
            <signal id="state" type="reg" width_description="[1:0]"/>
            
            <signal id="p_red" type="reg"/>
            <signal id="p_yellow" type="reg"/>
            <signal id="p_green" type="reg"/>
        </signal_list>
        
        <assign id="clock" value="cnt" />
    </logic_description>
    
    <implementation>
        // State transition logic
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (~rst_n) begin
                state <= idle;
                p_red <= 0;
                p_yellow <= 0;
                p_green <= 0;
            end else begin
                case(state)
                    idle: begin
                        p_red <= 0;
                        p_yellow <= 0;
                        p_green <= 0;
                        state <= s1_red;
                    end
                    
                    s1_red: begin
                        if (cnt == 3) begin
                            state <= s3_green;
                        end
                    end
                    
                    s2_yellow: begin
                        if (cnt == 3) begin
                            state <= s1_red;
                        end
                    end
                    
                    s3_green: begin
                        if (cnt == 3) begin
                            state <= s2_yellow;
                        end
                    end
                
                endcase
            end
            
        end
        
        // Counter logic
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (~rst_n) begin
                cnt <= 10;
            end else begin
                if(pass_request && green) begin
                    cnt <= 10;
                end else begin
                    if (!green && p_green) begin
                        cnt <= 60;
                    end else if(!yellow && p_yellow) begin
                        cnt <= 5;
                    end else if(!red && p_red) begin
                        cnt <= 10;
                    end else begin
                        cnt <= cnt - 1;
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        
        
        // Output assignment logic
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (~rst_n) begin
                {red,yellow,green} <= {3{1'b0}};
            end else begin
                {red,yellow,green} <= {p_red,p_yellow,p_green};
            end
        end
    
    </implementation>
    
    <task>
    </task>
</module>
